phases.label: Level 1
phases.why: Q the contacts and stack flow off the wave dashes — your level 1 already out-trades careless casters.

phases.label: Level 2
phases.why: E-dance through the wave: the dash web makes you unhittable to anything aimed. Build the tornado quietly.

phases.label: Level 3
phases.why: Wind Wall online — the mage lane's entire business model is now a suggestion. Wall the rotation, not the poke.

phases.label: Levels 4-5
phases.why: EQ-cycle the wave into his face: flow shields eat his chip and the knockup threat taxes his every step.

phases.label: Level 6
phases.why: Last Breath online — any knockup is now a deletion: yours, your jungler's, anyone's. The lane plays grounded.

phases.label: First item
phases.why: First item spike: crit-EQ trades chunk and the all-in math turns lethal off one tornado.

phases.label: 2+ items
phases.why: Late Yasuo flanks the wombo: wall their poke, ride the knockup chain, and Last Breath the clump your engage lifted.

phases.label: Level 3
phases.why: Slight deficit at level 3: Cassiopeia's grounded-zone DPS edge out your windwall dash-weaving on the margins. You can still trade — just let him start the exchanges and answer on your terms.

phases.label: Levels 4-5

phases.label: Level 6

phases.label: First item

phases.why: Last Breath online — any knockup is now a deletion: yours, your jungler's, anyone's. The lane plays grounded.

phases.label: First item
phases.why: First item spike: crit-EQ trades chunk and the all-in math turns lethal off one tornado.

phases.label: 2+ items
phases.why: Late Yasuo flanks the wombo: wall their poke, ride the knockup chain, and Last Breath the clump your engage lifted.
